Third-party art

Dawnlike art and license

Auto-Battle Got Me Killed uses Dawnlike extensively and includes modified and recomposed Dawnlike artwork.

Credit

Tileset
Dawnlike by DragonDePlatino
Palette
DB32 palette by DawnBringer
Source package
hadean-mirrors/dawnlike
Original page
OpenGameArt project page
License used
Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 Unported

What we changed

Some sprites were recolored, redrawn, decorated, extracted, or recomposed into equipment, animation, wall, object, and UI images. The archive below contains every currently identified modified or recomposed Dawnlike image, together with a per-file manifest and modification category.

Unmodified Dawnlike images used by the game are credited here but are not duplicated in this modified-art archive.

Modified-art package

Download the CC BY-SA package (96 PNG files)
Package date
2026-07-14
Upstream revision
1b6bf5c265eaca6c253482d29fe01822c81fbba3
Contents
Artwork, MANIFEST.csv, attribution, license notice, modification notice, and upstream README

SHA-256

086f2b062c735ec9a8833e40de16f1aaf100e099d2a509ae7727454ca34b2132

License scope and version note

The GitHub mirror package identifies Dawnlike as CC BY-SA 3.0. The current OpenGameArt page displays CC BY 4.0, but we have not found clear relicensing provenance for the mirrored package, so this release conservatively follows the package's CC BY-SA 3.0 notice.

CC BY-SA 3.0 applies to the Dawnlike-derived artwork in the archive. It does not apply to the game's code, trademarks, original artwork, or unrelated third-party assets.

Questions about this notice: thekgameboys@gmail.com
